raw_consumer_statement:
Starting XX/XX/XXXX, criminals repeatedly added themselves as authorized users on my Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX, with their own names and card numbers. This happened four separate times over nine months with four different names ( XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX ). In total, 10 different card numbers were issued on my account. My account address was changed fraudulently three times to addresses in XXXX  and XXXX. All fraudulent charges were made in XXXXXXXX XXXX. I live in XXXXXXXX XXXX 

The last legitimate charge on my account was XX/XX/XXXX. Every charge after that date is fraudulent. 

I first reported the fraud in XX/XX/XXXX. I was told the charges would be investigated. When I called back in XX/XX/XXXX, I was told no investigation had ever been started. XXXX more months of fraud occurred during that gap. 

I have called Barclays at least nine times. I have received contradictory information repeatedly. On XX/XX/XXXX, agent XXXX told me she manually marked all charges as fraudulent and closed all accounts. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was told the investigation denied my claim. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was told both that the claim was denied AND that the investigation was ongoing, in the same call. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, the investigations team confirmed verbally that ALL charges had been accepted as fraud and would be deleted, including late fees, within 60 days. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, well past the 60-day window, I was told charges on at least one of the fraudulent cards ( ending XXXX, in the name of XXXX XXXX XXXX were never reported as fraudulent and I still owed the money. This directly contradicts what I was told on XX/XX/XXXX. 

I am requesting : ( 1 ) Immediate removal of all fraudulent charges across all card numbers. ( 2 ) Removal of all late fees, interest, and penalties. ( 3 ) Correction of any negative credit reporting to all three bureaus with written confirmation. ( 4 ) Written explanation of how four unauthorized users were added to my account. ( 5 ) Written explanation of why my XX/XX/XXXX fraud report was never investigated. 
I have complete documentation of every statement, card number, fraudulent address change, and phone call.
